category_sources: source_facts.description identifies htslib as a C library for high-throughput sequencing data formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives htslib; current_curation.display-name also gives htslib.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official htslib site, which provides a dedicated /doc documentation area; source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states high-throughput sequencing data formats and C library role; source_facts.executables lists related tools such as bgzip and tabix.
